myPrereviews.description: Heading for the page showing the PREreviews authored by the user.

onlyYouCanSee.message: Only you can see this page. You have two profile pages that everyone can see:
onlyYouCanSee.description: Text shown to explain the visibility of their profile pages.

viewPublicProfile.description: Link to view the user’s public profile.

viewPseudonymProfile.description: Link to view the user’s pseudonym profile.

notPublished.message: You haven’t published a PREreview yet.
notPublished.description: Text shown when the user has not published any PREreviews.

appearHere.message: When you do, it’ll appear here.
appearHere.description: Text shown when the user has not published any PREreviews.

reviewAPreprint.description: Button to the page where the user can start a PREreview.

havingProblems.description: Heading of the page when we’re unable to show the user’s PREreviews.

unableToShow.message: We’re unable to show your PREreviews now.
unableToShow.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.

tryAgainLater.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Sorry, we’re having problems”.
